Vince: ...Did you feel that? Like someone just walked past us?
Lena: No one’s there. You’re imagining things again.
Vince: I’m serious. The air changed when we turned that corner.
Lena: Don’t start. This place messes with your head already.
Vince: Then explain why I keep hearing footsteps that don’t match ours.
Lena: ...Okay, that *was* weird. I heard it too.
Vince: So I’m not crazy. We’re being followed.
Lena: Not followed. Watched. There’s a difference… and I don’t like either.
Vince: We should’ve left when the lights flickered the first time.
Lena: Too late now. Whatever’s here knows we noticed it.
